chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Application 838 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of CMA No.3665/2024 18.11.2025 Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate holds brief for Mr. Khalilullah Jakhro, advocate for the applicant Reference application is pending since 2024 and despite interim orders operating applicant remains absent. On 14.10.2025 matter was adjourned and a fixed date was given at the request of learned counsel for the applicant. Time was extended on the subsequent date. Thereafter, on a fixed date again applicant remains absent without intimation or justification. Today, once again despite a fixed date having been granted a brief is being held and adjournment being sought for no cogent reason whatsoever. In view hereof, it appears that the applicant has lost interest to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, the instant SCRA stands dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
